metadata.title: The State of Primary Sclerosing Cholangitis Therapeutic Targets: A Unified Evidence Perspective

sections.Abstract: A comprehensive review of Primary Sclerosing Cholangitis Therapeutic Targets, synthesizing multi-omics data and literature.
sections.Introduction: PSC is a complex liver disease requiring advanced therapeutic targets.
sections.Meta-Analysis: Pooled effect sizes from UEG evidence show consensus on protein X.
sections.Discussion: Integrating 7 sources from the knowledge fabric.
sections.Conclusion: Future directions should focus on quantum-enhanced drug discovery.
